text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's the book! But it's so high up...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Someone else is using the stepladder... That's
fine. I can do this!)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Gah! I didn't notice you struggling there! And
here I was, hogging the stepladder. I'm really
sorry...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, don't worry about it! I'm the one who
should have said something...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite successfully getting the book she wanted,
Nishino Flower feels a little bad for causing
others to worry about her...
